blended.narrative: Mt. Hood Skibowl is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 10 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,030 ft. Looking ahead, 19 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.2" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 5" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Wednesday: 8" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 23".
